element.hint: Display the current numeric value below the gauge
element.label: Show Value
element.name: show_value

element.hint: Style of the gauge arc: progress bar, full circle, or speedometer
element.label: Dial - Style
element.name: arc_style

element.hint: Thickness of the gauge arc band in pixels
element.label: Arc Width
element.name: arc_width

element.hint: Font size of the displayed value in pixels
element.label: Value Font Size
element.name: value_font_size

element.hint: Ending angle of the gauge arc in degrees
element.label: End Angle (degrees)
element.name: end_angle

element.hint: Unit label shown after the value (e.g., %, ms, GB)
element.label: Units Label
element.name: units

element.hint: JSON array defining color zones [{min, max, color}] on the arc
element.label: Zones Config (JSON)
element.name: zones_config

element.hint: Maximum value on the gauge scale
element.label: Max Value
element.name: max_value

element.hint: Starting angle of the gauge arc in degrees
element.label: Start Angle (degrees)
element.name: start_angle

element.hint: Minimum value on the gauge scale
element.label: Min Value
element.name: min_value
